description: Add version logging to MCP server startup and --version flag to create-opentabs-plugin CLI

userStories.title: Log version on MCP server startup
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the MCP server to log its version on startup so that I can quickly identify which version is running from the console output.
acceptanceCriteria: MCP server startup log line includes the version number (e.g., 'MCP server v0.0.1 listening on http://localhost:9515')
Version is read from the existing version.ts module (no new file needed)
Version only appears on first load, not on hot reloads (matches existing isHotReload guard)

userStories.title: Add --version flag to create-opentabs-plugin CLI
userStories.description: As a plugin developer, I want to run 'create-opentabs-plugin --version' to see which version of the scaffolding tool I have installed, so I can verify I'm using the latest version.
acceptanceCriteria: create-opentabs-plugin --version outputs the version from package.json
create-opentabs-plugin -V outputs the version from package.json
Version is read dynamically from the package's own package.json (not hardcoded)
